name: Scott McManus
abilities: ★ First of the Conjurers — brewed the Open's original scoring app from raw Replit aether and summoned its very first AI art. The tradition you hold in your hand began at his bench.
Best in Show. 2024 — a career-best individual net 4th of 20; otherwise a cheerful mid-pack hand who lives for "another gong show."
flavor: “That's the stuff dreams are made of.”
caption: Scott McManus · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
